result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 16:     AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
                                ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
-- owner assignment history (transfers) in last 4 quarters
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS from_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS to_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.today + INTERVAL '1 day'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT
    from_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE from_owner IS NOT NULL AND from_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY from_owner
),
-- agents who handled > 0 cases in last 4 quarters, counting both initial owners and transferees
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.today + INTERVAL '1 day'
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
  UNION
  SELECT to_owner AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE to_owner IS NOT NULL AND to_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY to_owner
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
-- owner assignment history (transfers) in last 4 quarters
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS from_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS to_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.today + INTERVAL '1 day'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT
    from_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE from_owner IS NOT NULL AND from_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY from_owner
),
-- agents who handled > 0 cases in last 4 quarters, counting both initial owners and transferees
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.today + INTERVAL '1 day'
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
  UNION
  SELECT to_owner AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE to_owner IS NOT NULL AND to_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY to_owner
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
-- owner assignment history (transfers) in last 4 quarters
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS from_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS to_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.today + INTERVAL '1 day'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT
    from_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE from_owner IS NOT NULL AND from_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY from_owner
),
-- agents who handled > 0 cases in last 4 quarters, counting both initial owners and transferees
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.today + INTERVAL '1 day'
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
  UNION
  SELECT to_owner AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE to_owner IS NOT NULL AND to_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY to_owner
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS today_ts,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS from_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS to_owner,
    CAST(ch.createddate AS timestamp) AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND CAST(ch.createddate AS timestamp) >= p.start_ts
    AND CAST(ch.createddate AS timestamp) < p.today_ts + INTERVAL '1 day'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT
    from_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE from_owner IS NOT NULL AND from_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY from_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE CAST(c.createddate AS timestamp) >= p.start_ts
    AND CAST(c.createddate AS timestamp) < p.today_ts + INTERVAL '1 day'
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
  UNION
  SELECT to_owner AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE to_owner IS NOT NULL AND to_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY to_owner
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (

    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS today_ts,

owner_changes AS (

    CAST(ch.createddate AS timestamp) AS created_ts

    AND CAST(ch.createddate AS timestamp) >= p.start_ts
    AND CAST(ch.createddate AS timestamp) < p.today_ts + INTERVAL '1 day'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT
    from_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes

handled_agents AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id

  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE CAST(c.createddate AS timestamp) >= p.start_ts
    AND CAST(c.createddate AS timestamp) < p.today_ts + INTERVAL '1 day'
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
  UNION
  SELECT to_owner AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE to_owner IS NOT NULL AND to_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY to_owner

SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"

LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
